metadata.title: Lesbian Chat - The #1 Safe & Free Online Community for Women
metadata.description: Join the most active Lesbian Chat in the US. A verified, safe space for women to connect, date, and share. Free registration, no bots, just real connections.

openGraph.title: LesbianChat.us - Connect with Women Like You
openGraph.description: The premier safe space for lesbian women. Chat, connect, and build community today.

hero.title: Connect with Real Women in a Safe Space
hero.subtitle: Welcome to LesbianChat.us. We are the premier community for lesbian women to meet, chat, and build meaningful relationships. Whether you are looking for friendship, support, or love, our verified platform ensures a secure and authentic experience.

ageVerification.title: Age Verification 18+
ageVerification.text: This community is for adults only. You must be at least 18 years old to enter.

report.success: Report sent. Thank you for keeping us safe.
report.title: Report User
report.description: Please select a reason for reporting this content. We review all reports to maintain safety.
report.label: Reason:

items.title: Found My Best Friend
items.content: "I was new to the city and felt isolated. Through LesbianChat, I found a group of women who love hiking as much as I do. It is not just a chat room. It is a lifeline."
items.author: Sarah, San Francisco - Joined 2023

items.title: Authentic Connections
items.content: "Dating apps felt superficial. Here, the conversation comes first. I met my partner in the general chat, and we just clicked. The vibe is so much more relaxed and genuine."
items.author: Elena & Jo, Austin - Joined 2024

items.title: Safe and Welcoming
items.content: "As a trans woman, I often worry about acceptance. This community has been incredibly welcoming and affirming. The moderation team does a great job keeping it safe."
items.author: Mia, New York - Joined 2024

items.title: Active Moderation
items.content: Our dedicated team monitors the platform 24/7 to ensure a harassment-free environment. We have zero tolerance for hate speech, bots, or predatory behavior.

items.title: Data Privacy
items.content: We do not sell your data. Your conversations are encrypted. We believe your personal life should stay personal. We only collect what is needed to run the service.

items.title: Community Standards
items.content: We foster a culture of respect and consent. Every member agrees to our code of conduct upon joining. We empower you to block and report anyone who violates these standards.

footer.disclaimer: Adults only (18+). We promote safe and consensual interactions.

cookieConsent.message: We use cookies to ensure the site functions correctly and to improve your experience.

about.title: About LesbianChat.us
about.description: Connecting women in a safe, respectful, and vibrant online community.

content.heading: Our Mission
content.text: We started LesbianChat.us with a simple goal: to create the most secure and engaging online space for lesbian, bisexual, and queer women. In a digital world often filled with noise, we offer a sanctuary for authentic connection.

content.heading: Why We Are Different
content.text: Unlike broad social networks, we focus specifically on the needs of our community. We prioritize safety features, verified profiles, and active moderation to ensure that this space remains truly yours.

content.heading: Growing Together
content.text: Since our launch, we have grown from a small group to a thriving nationwide network. We listen to our members and evolve the platform based on your feedback. This is your community.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: How we protect your data and your identity.

content.heading: Data Collection
content.text: We collect minimal data necessary to operate the service, such as your username and login credentials. We do not require real names or physical addresses for basic usage.

content.heading: No Third-Party Sharing
content.text: Your data is not for sale. We do not share your personal information with advertisers or third-party data brokers. Your trust is our most valuable asset.

content.heading: User Control
content.text: You have full control over your account. You can request a copy of your data or delete your account permanently at any time through your settings or by contacting support.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: The rules that keep our community safe and enjoyable.

content.heading: Respect and Inclusion
content.text: This is a space for all women. We do not tolerate racism, transphobia, or any form of discrimination. Treat every member with dignity and respect.

content.heading: Prohibited Content
content.text: Posting illegal content, spam, or malicious software is strictly prohibited and will result in an immediate ban. We cooperate with law enforcement when necessary.

content.heading: Age Requirement
content.text: You must be at least 18 years old to use this service. By accessing the site, you confirm that you meet this age requirement.

safety.title: Safety Guide
safety.description: Tips for staying safe online and offline.

content.heading: Protect Your Identity
content.text: Be cautious about sharing personal details like your full name, workplace, or home address. Use a unique password for this site.

content.heading: Meeting in Person
content.text: If you decide to meet a chat partner in person, always choose a public place. Tell a friend where you are going and who you are meeting. Trust your instincts.

content.heading: Reporting Issues
content.text: If someone makes you feel uncomfortable, do not hesitate to use the block and report features. Our team investigates every report thoroughly.

content.heading: Support Team
content.text: For technical issues or account help, email us at support@lesbianchat.us. We aim to respond within 24 hours.

content.heading: Safety Concerns
content.text: For urgent safety issues or to report a violation, please contact safety@lesbianchat.us or use the in-chat reporting tools.

content.heading: Partnerships
content.text: Interested in partnering with us? Reach out to our business team via the form below.

content.heading: Operator
content.text: This service is operated as a private community project. We are dedicated to providing a free service for the community.

content.heading: Disclaimer
content.text: We are not responsible for the content of external links. The operators of linked sites are solely responsible for their content.
